nodes.itemHTML: • Caldera - Scalable, automated, and extensible adversary emulation platform developed by MITRE.

• Dyno-Demandstars2 - A GTFS-based travel demand data format focusing on individual passenger demand suitable for dynamic network modeling developed by San Francisco County Transportation Authority, LMZ LLC, and UrbanLabs LLC.
• Emberstars707 - Collection of features from PE files that serve as a benchmark dataset for researchers.
• MalShare - Free Malware repository providing researchers access to samples, malicious feeds, and Yara results.
• MalwareGallerystars26 - Yet another malware collection in the Internet.

• PackingDatastars4 - Original dataset with sample PE files packed with a large variety of packers, including ASPack, BeRoEXEPacker, exe32pack, eXpressor, FSG, JDPack, MEW, Molebox, MPRESS, Neolite, NSPack, Pckman, PECompact, PEtite, RLPack, UPX, WinUpack, Yoda's Crypter and Yoda's Protector.
• SORELstars474 - Sophos-ReversingLabs 20 Million dataset.
• theZoostars8.8k - Project created to make the possibility of malware analysis open and available to the public.
• WildList - Cooperative listing of malwares reported as being in the wild by security professionals.
• Andromeda - Custom packer used in malware campaigns using RunPE techniques for evading AV mitigation methods.
• BIN-crypter - EXE protection software against crackers and decompilers.
• ELFuckstars27 - ELF packer for i386 original version from sk2 by sd.
• LM-X License Manager - LM-X License Manager lets you protect your products against piracy by enforcing various levels of security, save time, and reduce business risks.
• m0dern_p4ckerstars32 - Just a modern packer for elf binaries ( works on linux executables only ).
• MidgetPackstars178 - Midgetpack is a binary packer for ELF binaries, such as burneye, upx or other tools.

• Obsidium - Feature-rich professional software protection and licensing system designed as a cost effective and easy to implement, yet reliable and non-invasive way to protect your 32- and 64-bit Windows software applications and games from reverse engineering.
• PE-Packerstars158 - Simple packer for Windows 32-bits PE files.
• PE-Toystars3 - A PE file packer.
• Silent-Packerstars27 - Silent Packer is an ELF / PE packer written in pure C.
• Simple-PE32-Packerstars7 - Simple PE32 Packer with aPLib compression library.
• theArkstars33 - Windows x86 PE Packer In C++.
• UPX - Ultimate Packer for eXecutables.
• xorPackerstars6 - Simple packer working with all PE files which cipher your exe with a XOR implementation.
• Yoda Protector - Free, open source, Windows 32-bit software protector.
• Android Unpackerstars1k - Android Unpacker presented at Defcon 22: Android Hacker Protection Level 0.
• aPLib - Compression library based on the algorithm used in aPACK.
• AppSpearstars35 - Universal and automated unpacking system suitable for both Dalvik and ART.
• Bintropystars8 - Prototype analysis tool that estimates the likelihood that a binary file contains compressed or encrypted bytes.

• BitBlaze - Analysis platform that features a novel fusion of static and dynamic analysis techniques, mixed concrete and symbolic execution, and whole-system emulation and binary instrumentation, all to facilitate state-of-the art research on real security problems.
• Clamscan Unpacker - Unpacker derived from ClamAV.
• de4jsstars932 - JavaScript Deobfuscator and Unpacker.
• EXEInfo-PEstars309 - Fast detector for executable PE files.
• GUnpacker - Shell tool that performs OEP positioning and dumps decrypted code.
• Manalyzestars845 - Robust parser for PE files with a flexible plugin architecture which allows users to statically analyze files in-depth.
• PackerAttackerstars245 - Tool that uses memory and code hooks to detect packers.
• PackerBreaker - Tool for helping unpack, decompress and decrypt most of the programs packed, compressed or encrypted using advanced emulation technology.
• PackerGrindstars23 - Adaptive unpacking tool for tracking packing bahaviors and unpacking Android packed apps.
• Packing-Boxstars10 - Docker image gathering many packing-related tools and for making datasets of packed executables for use with machine learning.
• PEFramestars535 - Tool for performing static analysis on PE malware and generic suspicious files.
• PEiD - Packed Executable iDentifier.
• PEiD (yara)stars12 - Yet another implementation of PEiD with yara.
• PeLibstars56 - PE file manipulation library.
• PEPackstars530 - PE file packer detection tool, part of the Unix package "pev".
• PINdemoniumstars218 - Unpacker for PE files exploiting the capabilities of PIN.
• PolyUnpackstars10 - Implemention attempt of the general approach for extracting the original hidden code of PE files without any heuristic assumptions.
• PyPackerDetectstars28 - Small python script/library to detect whether an executable is packed.
• PyPackerDetect (refactored)stars7 - A complete refactoring of the original project to a Python package with a console script to detect whether an executable is packed.
• PyPeidstars3 - Yet another implementation of PEiD with yara-python.
• Quick Unpack - Generic unpacker that facilitates the unpacking process.
• Unipackerstars481 - Automatic and platform-independent unpacker for Windows binaries based on emulation.
• Uunp (IDA Pro plugin) - IDA Pro debugger plug-in module automating the analysis and unpacking of packed binaries.
• VirusTotal - File analysis Web service for detecting malware.
• VMUnpacker - Unpacker based on the technology of virtual machine.

• Biohack Academy - Open-source biotechnological hardware such as Incubator, Thermocycler, Centrifuge, Microscope, etc.

• Bartibstars309 - Easy to use time tracking tool.
• dzrstars89 - deezer.com player.
• trycaststars51 - Parse JSON-like values whose shape is defined by typed dictionaries (TypedDicts) and other standard Python type hints.
• ParamSpec Guide - Newly released feature in PEP612 allows you do a lot of advanced typing things with functions and their signatures.
• flake8-type-ignore - flake8 plugin to disallow type: ignore comments in your typed Python code.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Tools

Helper tools to add annotations to existing code
nodes.itemHTML: • auto-optionalstars13 - Makes typed arguments Optional when the default argument is None.
• Python-typing-koansstars111 - A set of examples to learn optional static typing in Python.
• Adding type hints to urllib3 - Tests are not enough: Case study adding type hints to urllib3.
• Adam Johnsons Blog - Adam Johnson blogs about typing practices.
• Surmagicstars259 - Create XCFrameworks with ease! A Command Line Tool to create XCFramework for multiple platforms at one shot! iOS, Mac Catalyst, tvOS, macOS, and watchOS.
• Instructables - Instructables is a place that lets you explore, document, and share your creations.
• Hackaday.io - Hackaday.io is the world's largest collaborative hardware development community.
• Openlifescience - Program to make Open Science ambassadors in research.
• Wikipedia - General information about Open Source Hardware.
• The Journal of Open Hardware - (JOH) is a peer reviewed open access publication for open hardware research and development.
• Unix System Programming with Standard ML - Anthony L. Shipman (PDF)
• OneDrive - Best cloud storage solution for Windows users.
• pCloud - A cloud storage solution with a strong focus on security.
• Puppeteer IDEstars101 - Standalone Puppeteer playground in browser's developer tools.
